---
title: "Projects"
---

## ML DOTA Project
Predictive modeling using game data from DOTA 2.  
**Stack:** Python, Machine Learning  
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/GreenCurve/ML_DOTA_PRJ)

---

## Presentation to GPT Converter
Converts PowerPoint presentations into text for LLM consumption.  
**Stack:** Python  
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/GreenCurve/Presentation-conversion-for-the-GPT)

---

## Interactive Portfolio Demo
OOP-based Shiny app — see the Home page for the live embed.  
**Stack:** Python, Shiny, Posit Connect Cloud
